meta.purpose: Second production batch for the 1000-image Mingli/Yixue education library. It establishes the core visual language for basic doctrine, report literacy, naming, feng shui, qimen and cultural-ethics topics.

assets.title: 命理易学知识全景地图
assets.description: 用一张图说明易学、八字、风水、奇门、六爻、相学、起名与世界易的关系。
assets.subject: A complete map of Mingli and Yixue knowledge domains connected to World Yi reasoning.
assets.userQuestion: How do traditional metaphysics topics connect without becoming a confusing encyclopedia?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 命理易学，不是散乱术语
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 命理易學，不是散亂術語
mustShow: eight knowledge islands: Yijing, Bazi, five elements, stems branches, feng shui, qimen, naming, cultural physiognomy
arrows back to structure, timing, environment, action, risk and review
clear boundary note as visual seal: non-deterministic education
assets.layout: large atlas infographic with central compass and eight detailed islands, layered manuscript texture, routes back to modern reasoning
assets.altText: 命理易学知识全景地图连接易学八字风水奇门六爻起名和世界易

assets.title: 传统术语到现代判断翻译桥
assets.description: 把旺衰、吉凶、用神、行运、卦象翻译为承载、代价、应顺、阶段与变化。
assets.subject: A bridge translating traditional metaphysics terms into modern World Yi decision language.
assets.userQuestion: How can traditional terms become useful judgment language without fear or fatalism?
mustShow: left side traditional terms on manuscript cards
right side modern cards: capacity, cost, support, stage, change, review
assets.layout: bridge diagram, classical manuscript cards crossing into modern product cards, visible transformation path
assets.altText: 传统术语旺衰吉凶用神行运卦象翻译为现代判断语言的桥梁图

assets.title: 阴阳不是好坏
assets.description: 说明阴阳是显隐、动静、收放、寒热等张力关系，不是善恶判断。
assets.subject: Yin and yang as dynamic polarity, not moral good and bad.
assets.userQuestion: How should beginners understand yin-yang without reducing it to good versus bad?
mustShow: large yin-yang center with layered polarity rings
dynamic balance arrows rather than moral symbols
assets.layout: symbolic polarity board with central yin-yang, surrounding cards, soft motion arrows and balanced composition
assets.altText: 阴阳不是好坏而是动静显隐收放寒热内外张力关系

assets.title: 两仪到四象生成图
assets.description: 说明阴阳两仪如何展开为少阳、太阳、少阴、太阴四个阶段。
assets.subject: Generation from Liangyi to Sixiang as a stage model of change.
assets.userQuestion: How do two polarities become four stages of change?
mustShow: top origin point splitting into yin and yang
second layer generating four quadrant stage cards
arrows that clearly show generation order
assets.layout: vertical generative cosmology chart, origin to two polarities to four stage panels, rich symbolic lighting
assets.altText: 两仪生四象生成图展示少阳太阳少阴太阴阶段关系

assets.title: 八卦不是图标
assets.description: 说明八卦是天地雷风水火山泽的变化模型，而不是孤立符号。
assets.subject: Bagua as a model of change with eight natural images and modern reasoning applications.
assets.userQuestion: Why is Bagua a change model rather than a decorative symbol?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 八卦不是图标，是变化模型
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 八卦不是圖標，是變化模型
mustShow: large bagua ring with eight readable trigram labels
natural symbolic scenes for heaven earth thunder wind water fire mountain lake
modern reasoning panels: structure, environment, action
assets.layout: cosmology diagram board with bagua ring, eight natural mini-scenes and modern reasoning panels
assets.altText: 八卦不是图标而是天地雷风水火山泽变化模型的说明图

assets.title: 先天八卦与后天八卦区别
assets.description: 用对照图说明先天八卦偏结构秩序，后天八卦偏运行方位和环境落地。
assets.subject: The difference between Xiantian Bagua and Houtian Bagua for structure and environment.
assets.userQuestion: Why are there different Bagua arrangements and how should users understand them?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 先天看结构，后天看运行
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 先天看結構，後天看運行
mustShow: left labeled structure order, right labeled directional operation
comparison arrows and environmental floor-plan layer
clear visual distinction without dense text
assets.layout: side-by-side comparison board, left cosmological order ring, right spatial operation ring over floor-plan texture
assets.altText: 先天八卦与后天八卦区别说明结构秩序和运行方位

assets.title: 五行相生图
assets.description: 说明木生火、火生土、土生金、金生水、水生木是资源传递，不是简单吉凶。
assets.subject: Five elements generating cycle as resource transfer and system support.
assets.userQuestion: How does the generating cycle work without turning it into simplistic luck labels?
mustShow: five-element cycle wheel with strong readable labels
resource arrows moving through wood fire earth metal water
modern cards: growth, expression, carrying, ordering, flowing
assets.layout: rich circular five-element board, resource-flow arrows, symbolic materials and five modern interpretation cards
assets.altText: 五行相生图展示木生火火生土土生金金生水水生木资源流动

assets.title: 五行相克图
assets.description: 说明木克土、土克水、水克火、火克金、金克木是约束调节，不是坏事。
assets.subject: Five elements controlling cycle as constraint and system regulation.
assets.userQuestion: How should users understand controlling relationships without fear?
mustShow: constraint arrows with calm regulation metaphor
visual note that control is not automatically bad
assets.layout: five-point star regulation diagram, control arrows, balancing dashboard, symbolic materials and clear hierarchy
assets.altText: 五行相克图展示木克土土克水水克火火克金金克木系统调节

assets.title: 五行制化与失衡图
assets.description: 说明过旺、过弱、乘侮、制化和转化如何作为系统平衡问题来理解。
assets.subject: Five elements balance, transformation, overgrowth and weakness as a system regulation model.
assets.userQuestion: What does imbalance mean in five elements analysis?
mustShow: system dashboard with five elements at different levels
warning zones shown calmly, not fearfully
modern interpretation cards for capacity and cost
assets.layout: systems control-room infographic, gauges for five elements, transformation arrows and balancing levers
assets.altText: 五行制化与失衡图说明过旺过弱乘侮制化转化和平衡

assets.title: 五行季节方位图
assets.description: 说明春木、夏火、长夏土、秋金、冬水与方位、节律和环境的关系。
assets.subject: Five elements mapped to seasons, directions and environmental rhythm.
assets.userQuestion: Why do seasons and directions matter in five elements interpretation?
mustShow: season wheel with five element zones
clear five colors without noisy decoration
assets.layout: seasonal compass wheel, five landscape zones, rhythm cards and soft environmental texture
assets.altText: 五行季节方位图展示春木夏火长夏土秋金冬水和环境节律

assets.title: 十天干总览图
assets.description: 说明甲乙丙丁戊己庚辛壬癸的阴阳、五行和现代判断入口。
assets.subject: Ten Heavenly Stems overview with yin-yang, five elements and modern interpretation.
assets.userQuestion: How can users remember and understand the ten Heavenly Stems?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 十天干，是天时的十种表达
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 十天干，是天時的十種表達
mustShow: ten large readable stem glyph cards
yin-yang split and five-element color grouping
modern interpretation rail: growth, expression, carrying, ordering, flowing
assets.layout: ten-card doctrine board, five paired element zones, large characters, modern interpretation rail
assets.altText: 十天干总览图展示甲乙丙丁戊己庚辛壬癸阴阳五行

assets.title: 十二地支总览图
assets.description: 说明子丑寅卯辰巳午未申酉戌亥与时间、月份、方位和生肖的关系。
assets.subject: Twelve Earthly Branches overview with time, month, direction and zodiac as entry points.
assets.userQuestion: Why are Earthly Branches more than zodiac animals?
mustShow: twelve large readable branch glyphs around a time wheel
month, hour, direction and zodiac layers as icons
clear note that zodiac is only an entry
assets.layout: twelve-branch time compass, calendar and direction layers, zodiac icons as secondary entry points
assets.altText: 十二地支总览图展示子丑寅卯辰巳午未申酉戌亥时间月份方位生肖

assets.title: 地支藏干结构图
assets.description: 说明地支内部藏干不是神秘暗号，而是内部结构和力量来源。
assets.subject: Hidden Heavenly Stems inside Earthly Branches as inner structure and force source.
assets.userQuestion: What are hidden stems and why do reports mention them?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 地支里面，也有内部结构
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 地支裡面，也有內部結構
mustShow: one branch as a transparent container with inner stem layers
three layer cards for main, middle and residual qi
small twelve-branch overview ring without tiny text
modern structure metaphor like nested system
assets.layout: nested container diagram, transparent branch chamber, inner stem layers and overview ring
assets.altText: 地支藏干结构图说明本气中气余气和内部结构

assets.title: 四柱八字结构图
assets.description: 说明年柱、月柱、日柱、时柱、日主、月令在报告里的位置。
assets.subject: Four pillars Bazi structure with year, month, day, hour, day master and month command.
assets.userQuestion: What is the basic structure users should understand before reading a Bazi report?
mustShow: four pillar columns as large readable cards
birth data flowing into report structure
assets.layout: premium report-education board, four large columns, highlighted day master and month command, input-to-report flow
assets.altText: 四柱八字结构图展示年柱月柱日柱时柱日主月令

assets.title: 真太阳时与节气边界图
assets.description: 说明出生时间、地点、时区、真太阳时和节气切换如何影响排盘精度。
assets.subject: Birth time correction using location, timezone, true solar time and solar term boundaries.
assets.userQuestion: Why does a birth chart need location and solar-term boundary checks?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 时间差一点，结构可能不同
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 時間差一點，結構可能不同
mustShow: birth info card flowing into timezone and location correction
report accuracy seal without fear tone
assets.layout: time-correction flowchart, map pin, clock, sun path, solar-term gate and report output
assets.altText: 真太阳时与节气边界图说明出生地时区真太阳时节气影响排盘

assets.title: 十神不是人物标签
assets.description: 说明比劫、食伤、财、官杀、印是关系功能，不是单句定人生。
assets.subject: Ten Gods as relationship functions in Bazi, not fixed personality or destiny labels.
assets.userQuestion: How should users understand Ten Gods without turning them into deterministic labels?
mustShow: central day master with five relation-function zones
relationship arrows rather than person labels
modern cards: peers, output, resources, rules, support
assets.layout: relationship function map around central day master, five zones with arrows and modern interpretation cards
assets.altText: 十神关系功能图说明比劫食伤财星官杀印星不是人物标签

assets.title: 用神忌神现代翻译图
assets.description: 把用神、忌神翻译成应顺之力、应避之力和行动边界。
assets.subject: Modern translation of useful and unfavorable gods as supportive force, avoidant force and action boundary.
assets.userQuestion: How can users understand useful gods without mystifying them?
mustShow: decision path with supportive force and avoidant force
no claim that one element guarantees success
assets.layout: modern decision board, two-force balance, boundary line, action cards and timing markers
assets.altText: 用神忌神现代翻译图说明应顺应避代价边界行动

assets.title: 大运流年关系图
assets.description: 说明十年大运是阶段背景，流年是年度触发，不应只看某一年吉凶。
assets.subject: Relationship between ten-year luck periods and yearly flow as stage background and yearly trigger.
assets.userQuestion: How do great luck periods and yearly flow work together?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 大运看阶段，流年看触发
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 大運看階段，流年看觸發
mustShow: long ten-year timeline as background band
assets.layout: timeline infographic, long decade band with yearly trigger cards and review loop, editorial share-friendly design
assets.altText: 大运流年关系图说明十年阶段背景和年度触发

assets.title: 太岁不是恐吓图
assets.description: 说明太岁、值太岁、冲太岁、刑害破应理解为年度结构被放大，而不是恐吓。
assets.subject: Tai Sui explained as amplified yearly structure, not fear-based prediction.
assets.userQuestion: How can Tai Sui content be shareable but not fear-based?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 太岁不是恐吓，是年度结构
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 太歲不是恐嚇，是年度結構
mustShow: annual structure dial instead of scary deity image
risk boundary and action planning cards
assets.layout: shareable annual education poster, structure dial, relation cards and calm boundary seal
assets.altText: 太岁不是恐吓图说明值太岁冲太岁刑害破是年度结构

assets.title: 本命年复盘节奏图
assets.description: 说明本命年不是必坏，而是同类结构被放大，适合复盘、设边界和调整节奏。
assets.subject: Ben Ming Nian as review rhythm and amplified same-branch structure, not guaranteed bad luck.
assets.userQuestion: How can Ben Ming Nian be explained in a shareable and non-fear-based way?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 本命年不是必坏，是提醒复盘
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 本命年不是必壞，是提醒複盤
mustShow: four action cards: review, boundary, rhythm, adjustment
no red fear or disaster symbols
assets.layout: vertical editorial share cover, calendar ring, review notebook, four action cards and warm parchment background
assets.altText: 本命年复盘节奏图说明本命年不是必坏而是复盘边界节奏调整

assets.title: 康熙字典起名判断地图
assets.description: 聚合说明康熙字典、繁简异体、部首、笔画、字义、字音、使用场景与起名判断的关系。
assets.subject: Kangxi dictionary and naming judgment map, aggregating strokes, radicals, simplified/traditional variants, meaning, sound, context and usage cost.
assets.userQuestion: How should users understand Kangxi dictionary and naming without believing a name changes destiny?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 起名不是改命，是长期使用结构
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 起名不是改命，是長期使用結構
mustShow: surrounding modules for radical, strokes, simplified/traditional, variants, meaning, sound and usage context
naming decision path with long-term use cost
assets.layout: museum-grade aggregate knowledge board, central dictionary spread, seven surrounding modules, flow arrows and seals, rich but readable
assets.altText: 康熙字典起名判断地图说明繁简异体部首笔画字义字音场景

assets.title: 字的五行判断方法图
assets.description: 说明字五行不能只看单一笔画，应综合部首、字义、字形、音韵、使用场景和姓名结构。
assets.subject: How to judge a Chinese character's five-element tendency through radical, meaning, shape, sound, context and name structure.
assets.userQuestion: How can character five elements be judged without relying on one simplistic rule?
mustShow: one large sample character as abstract glyph, not a real person's name
warning that single-rule judgment is insufficient
assets.layout: character analysis laboratory board, central glyph, six lenses, five-element meter and naming structure path
assets.altText: 字的五行判断方法图说明部首字义字形字音笔画结构综合判断

assets.title: 风水空间秩序图
assets.description: 说明风水图只解释空间动线、采光、恢复位、冲突源和环境秩序，不替代建筑安全与专业设计。
assets.subject: Feng shui as spatial order, movement path, light, recovery position and conflict source, not a substitute for professional design or safety.
assets.userQuestion: How can feng shui be explained as environmental reasoning without superstition or unsafe advice?
mustShow: abstract home floor plan with movement arrows
assets.layout: architectural spatial infographic, warm abstract floor plan, airflow paths, light zones and environmental reasoning cards
assets.altText: 风水空间秩序图说明动线采光恢复位冲突源和环境秩序

assets.title: 奇门遁甲现代应用地图
assets.description: 说明奇门遁甲可以作为时空局势、资源、路径和行动窗口的文化模型，不做神秘承诺。
assets.subject: Qimen Dunjia as a cultural model for situation, resources, path and action window.
assets.userQuestion: How should Qimen Dunjia be presented as structured culture rather than mystical guarantee?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 奇门看局势、资源与行动窗口
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 奇門看局勢、資源與行動窗口
mustShow: abstract nine-palace grid with modern decision map layer
situation, resource, path and action window cards
assets.layout: nine-palace strategy board, classical grid fused with modern pathfinding dashboard, action-window highlights
assets.altText: 奇门遁甲现代应用地图说明局势资源路径行动窗口和复盘

assets.title: 面相手相相学边界图
assets.description: 说明面相、手相、摸骨只能做传统文化普及，不能从真实人脸或手掌推断命运、健康、人格和能力。
assets.subject: Cultural education boundary for physiognomy, palmistry and bone-reading, using abstract non-identifiable diagrams.
assets.userQuestion: How can physiognomy and palmistry be included responsibly without judging real people?
mustShow: abstract manuscript-style face outline and palm line diagrams
clear boundary line between culture education and real-person judgment
no realistic face photo, no real palm photo, no body diagnosis
mustAvoid: claiming appearance predicts personality or destiny
assets.layout: cultural ethics education board, abstract line diagrams, boundary wall, respect seal and safety cards
assets.altText: 面相手相相学边界图说明只做文化普及不看真人不判健康人格命运
